task_completion.description: DreamPlan Home Design Software is open with the default sample house loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan application window is visible, displaying a contemporary sample house in either 2D or 3D view.

task_completion.description: The Doors or Openings catalog is accessed in the UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand or top panel shows the 'Doors' or 'Openings' library/catalog expanded.

task_completion.description: An archway or cased opening is selected from the catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An item labeled 'Arch', 'Archway', 'Cased Opening', or 'Opening' is highlighted or selected in the catalog. It must clearly be an open passage, not a solid or hinged door.

task_completion.description: The archway is installed on an interior wall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open passage (archway) is visibly placed on an interior wall (e.g., between the Hall and Living Room) in the 2D floor plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to preserve the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible, or the file menu shows the save action being executed, or a status indicator shows the project is saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DreamPlan GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse cursors, highlighted UI elements, and active DreamPlan windows rather than terminal prompts.

integrity.description: The agent used an actual archway/opening rather than a standard door.
integrity.visual_evidence: The placed object visually lacks hinges, a solid door leaf, or sliding panels, confirming it is an open passage.

integrity.description: The result is a genuine 3D/2D model modification.
integrity.visual_evidence: The archway integrates correctly with the wall geometry in DreamPlan, rather than looking like pasted text or an overlaid image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected keywords for the installed object include 'Arch', 'Archway', 'Cased Opening', or 'Opening'. The object must NOT be a standard 'hinged' or 'solid' door. The project should be saved, typically in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan Projects'.
